meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Agent 37 Cloud
products.tagline: Give every customer their own Hermes or OpenClaw agent
products.summaryZh: 让每位客户都拥有专属的Hermes或OpenClaw智能体
products.descriptionZh: Agent 37 是为 Hermes、OpenClaw 和 ClaudeCode 等持久化代理提供的托管服务。因此，您无需自行在 Mac mini 或 VPS 上运行它们。通过一次 API 调用，每位客户即可获得专属的常驻代理，起价每月 3.44 美元。创始人利用它向自己的客户交付垂直代理，无需再费心维护服务器。
products.description: Agent 37 is managed hosting for persistent agents like Hermes, OpenClaw and ClaudeCode. So you don't need to run them on Mac minis or VPS yourself. One API call gives each of your customers their own always-on agent, from $3.44/mo. Founders use it to ship vertical agents to their own clients without babysitting servers.

products.name: Atomic Mail Agentic
products.tagline: Let your agents read, send, and react to email autonomously
products.summaryZh: 让您的智能体自主读取、发送和回复邮件。
products.descriptionZh: Atomic Mail Agentic 为自主AI智能体提供独立的真实@atomicmail.ai收件箱，无需人工设置、验证或持续干预即可完全自主管理。基于JMAP（RFC 8620）标准邮箱API构建——该协议已被大语言模型熟练掌握，因此智能体能够可靠地执行读取、发送、回复、草稿、搜索及线程管理操作，显著减少重试次数。创新性的工作量证明注册机制可在约30秒内交付真实收件箱，全程无需验证码、信用卡、域名验证或邮件服务器运维。
products.description: Atomic Mail Agentic gives autonomous AI agents their own real @atomicmail.ai inbox to manage fully without human setup, verification, or ongoing intervention. Built on JMAP (RFC 8620), the standard mailbox API LLMs already know fluently, so agents read, send, reply, draft, search, and manage threads reliably with fewer retries. Novel proof-of-work signup delivers a real inbox in ~30 seconds—no CAPTCHA, credit card, domain verification, or mail-server ops.

products.name: Grok by SpaceXAI for Word
products.tagline: Draft, restructure & tighten wording from panel inside Word
products.summaryZh: 在 Word 内部面板中起草、重组并精简措辞
products.descriptionZh: 直接在 Word 文档中与 AI 智能体协作。该插件提供基于对话的智能体侧边栏，可搜索网络、更新段落或构建专业文档。只需在对话面板中输入需求，即可让智能体处理调研与执行。无需离开 Word，即可要求其重写段落、总结长报告、优化清晰度与语气、生成大纲、创建表格或扩展思路。
products.description: Work with an AI Agent directly in your Word documents. The add-in enables a conversation-based agent sidebar that can search the web, update paragraphs, or build professional documents. Simply type what you want into the conversation pane and let the Agent handle research and execution. Ask it to rewrite paragraphs, summarize long reports, improve clarity and tone, generate outlines, create tables, or expand ideas, all without leaving Word.

products.name: Backgrind
products.tagline: Run your AI agents over any app, even games.
products.summaryZh: 在任何应用上运行你的AI智能体，包括游戏。
products.descriptionZh: 你的AI代理不该把你锁在终端里。Backgrind将其悬浮在始终置顶的窗口中，覆盖任何应用——甚至全屏游戏——只在真正需要决策时才提醒你。自带（Claude Code、Cursor）或使用内置代理Grindy，零配置即可运行。多代理标签、语音、构建/规划、点击穿透、本地优先——你的登录，你的历史。
products.description: Your AI agent shouldn't chain you to a terminal. Backgrind floats it in an always-on-top window over any app — even a fullscreen game — and pings you only when it actually needs a decision. Bring your own (Claude Code, Cursor) or use Grindy, the built-in agent with zero setup. Multi-agent tabs, voice, Build/Plan, click-through, local-first — your login, your history.

products.name: oioi
products.tagline: a fast, glassy clipboard manager for macOS, Windows & Linux
products.summaryZh: 一款快速、流畅的剪贴板管理器，支持 macOS、Windows 和 Linux
products.descriptionZh: 按下 ⌥V，剪贴板历史以实时液态玻璃效果浮现在眼前。文本、图片和文件均可搜索。免费开源，支持 macOS、Windows 和 Linux。
products.description: Press ⌥V and your clipboard history floats up in real liquid glass. Text, images and files, searchable. Free & open source for macOS, Windows and Linux.

products.name: Laguna by Poolside
products.tagline: Foundation models for agentic coding and long-horizon work
products.summaryZh: 面向智能体编程与长周期任务的基座模型
products.descriptionZh: Poolside是一家基础模型公司，致力于将智能融入所有工作场景。其使命是通过创造通用人工智能，为人类带来丰裕。
products.description: Poolside is a foundation model company bringing intelligence to everywhere work gets done. Their mission is to drive abundance for humanity by creating artificial general intelligence.

products.name: Cloudback MCP Server
products.tagline: Manage your backups from Claude, Cursor, and VS Code
products.summaryZh: 管理来自Claude、Cursor和VS Code的备份
products.descriptionZh: Cloudback 现已推出官方 MCP 服务器。可连接 Claude Code、Claude Desktop、Cursor、VS Code 或任意 MCP 客户端，通过自然语言对话管理备份定义、计划、存储和保留策略——覆盖 GitHub、GitLab、Azure DevOps 和 Linear。一条指令即可同时重新调度和调整 300 个备份定义的保留策略，无需操作仪表盘，也无需编写一次性脚本。以 Docker 镜像形式运行（myrtlelabs/cloudback-mcp）。
products.description: Cloudback now ships an official MCP server. Connect Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, or any MCP client and manage your backup definitions, schedules, storages, and retention policies through plain-language chat - across GitHub, GitLab, Azure DevOps, and Linear. One prompt can reschedule and re-retain 300 backup definitions at once - no dashboard clicks, no throwaway scripts. Runs as a Docker image (myrtlelabs/cloudback-mcp).

products.name: Notchkin
products.tagline: A notes app that lives in your MacBook's notch.
products.summaryZh: 一款驻留在MacBook刘海中的笔记应用。
products.descriptionZh: MacBook的刘海一直闲置无用，现在它能记笔记了。鼠标悬停其上，面板便会落下，你随手记下内容，继续工作。没错，还附赠一只略带被动攻击性的吉祥物。
products.description: Your MacBook's notch just sits there doing nothing. Now it takes notes. Hover over it, a panel drops down, you jot the thing down and carry on. And yes, there's a mildly passive-aggressive mascot.

products.name: Plansera AI
products.tagline: E-2 visa business plans, drafted by an AI
products.summaryZh: E-2签证商业计划书，由AI起草
products.descriptionZh: AI E-2签证代理进行面谈，审阅证据材料（银行对账单、租赁合同、发票），核查核心E-2资格标准，并生成可直接提交的方案，包含真实五年财务数据、图表及资金用途说明——以设计好的PDF和可编辑Word文档形式呈现。外部供应商收费约2000美元，律师助理需耗时一周完成。Plansera让您在约30分钟内获得一份扎实的初稿以供审阅。每份方案固定收费100美元，无需订阅。（专为美国移民专业人士打造。）
products.description: An AI E-2 Visa Agent interviews, reads their evidence (bank statements, leases, invoices), checks the core E-2 eligibility standards, and produces a submission-ready plan with real 5-year financials, charts, and use-of-funds — as a designed PDF and editable Word doc. Outside vendors charge ~$2,000 and paralegals spend a week on this. Plansera gives you a strong first draft to review in ~30 minutes. Flat $100 per plan, no subscription. (Built for U.S. immigration professionals.)

products.name: AlsonAI is launching Editor Mode
products.tagline: AI-assisted storybooks, now with full creative control.
products.summaryZh: AI辅助故事书，现已实现完全创意掌控。
products.descriptionZh: 作者现在可以在生成后直接编辑和润色故事文本，不再受限于初次输出。他们可以修改措辞、调整节奏、优化场景，并在AlsonAI内继续完善稿件。用户通过“重新生成图像”引导图像变化，同时AlsonAI会尽力保持全书的一致性。付费书籍最多可重新生成10次图像，免费预览最多可重新生成5次。我们的愿景是：AI辅助，用户主导的故事创作。
products.description: Authors can now directly edit and refine their story text after generation, instead of being locked into the first output. They can revise wording, adjust flow, improve scenes, and continue shaping the manuscript inside AlsonAI. Users guide image changes through Regenerate Image while AlsonAI works to preserve consistency across the book. Paid books include up to 10 image regenerations, and free previews include up to 5. Our vision: AI-assisted, user-owned storytelling.

products.name: snowscroll
products.tagline: Remove addictive feeds from your social media
products.summaryZh: 移除社交媒体中的成瘾性信息流
products.descriptionZh: 想象一下，没有Reels的Instagram、没有Shorts的YouTube、没有令人上瘾信息流的社交媒体。snowscroll让用户能够访问社交媒体的所有“社交”功能（私信、快拍、帖子等），而不会陷入消耗时间、精力和注意力的无意识刷屏中。目前支持Instagram、YouTube、X、Facebook、LinkedIn和TikTok。
products.description: Imagine Instagram without reels, Youtube without shorts, social media without addicting feeds. snowscroll allows users to access all the "social" parts of social media (DMs, stories, posts, etc) without being trapped in the doomscrolling that takes our time, energy, and focus away. It currently supports Instagram, Youtube, X, Facebook, Linkedin, and TikTok.

products.name: Beacon
products.tagline: Know before your dependencies break.
products.summaryZh: 在依赖项中断之前提前知晓。
products.descriptionZh: Beacon 在开源包被弃用成为事故前发出预警。获取 SPS 评分、层级警报和每日摘要——让团队在依赖项失效前采取行动，而非事后补救。
products.description: Beacon predicts open source package abandonment before it becomes your incident. Get SPS scores, tier alerts, and daily digests — so your team acts before the dependency breaks, not after.

products.name: Property Alpha
products.tagline: AI deal analysis for residential real estate investors
products.summaryZh: 住宅房地产投资者的AI交易分析
products.descriptionZh: 专有房地产评估引擎可将个性化投资假设与全国房源数据结合，数秒内输出定制化交易分析结果。支持按全套投资指标排序筛选，可跨州搜索最优利润标的。测试合租等不同租赁策略对盈利水平的影响。告别电子表格，几分钟而非数月内锁定下一个目标投资。
products.description: A proprietary real estate evaluation engine allows for personalized investment assumptions to be incorporated with nation-wide listing data, meaning you get customized deal analysis outputs in seconds. Sort and filter by a full suite of investment metrics. Search entire states for the most profitable deals. Test out how various rental strategies, such as co-living, alter profitability. Ditch the spreadsheets and identify your next target investment in minutes, not months.

products.name: Mira Gold's Writing Forge™
products.tagline: AI fiction that keeps continuity. One story, many forms.
products.summaryZh: 保持连贯性的AI虚构作品。一个故事，多种形态。
products.descriptionZh: 大多数AI能写出精彩的场景，但到了第12章就忘了你的角色。Mira Gold的Writing Forge专为长篇幅创作而生：一个动态设定库会追踪谁在何时知道什么、还有哪些未解之谜，让你的世界观在整部小说或系列中保持连贯。随后，你可以将同一个故事改编成剧本、歌曲或翻译版本。该工具不限定模型，支持自带密钥接入12家以上的服务商。
products.description: Most AI writes a great scene, then forgets your characters by chapter 12. Mira Gold's Writing Forge is built for long-form: a living canon tracks who knows what, when, and what's still open, so your world stays consistent across a whole novel or series. Then adapt that one story as a script, song, or translation. Model-agnostic, bring your own keys across 12+ providers.

products.name: PhotoFit
products.tagline: Compress a photo to an exact KB for passport & visa forms
products.summaryZh: 将照片压缩至指定KB大小，用于护照与签证申请表
products.descriptionZh: 将任意照片精确调整至指定KB或像素尺寸——适用于护照、签证、DV彩票、Aadhaar、PAN及政府表格上传。在浏览器中运行，不上传任何内容。
products.description: Resize or compress any photo to an exact KB or pixel size — for passport, visa, DV Lottery, Aadhaar, PAN and government form uploads. Runs in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

products.name: SpeakUp
products.tagline: Voice control for macOS that gets out of your way
products.summaryZh: macOS 语音控制，不打扰你的操作
products.descriptionZh: 用语音修正拼写错误并触发快捷操作，无需中断打字。无需听写，无需云端。说出单词，即可自动修正文本框中最近匹配的内容。基于Swift构建，设备端运行。MIT开源协议。支持macOS 12及以上系统。
products.description: Fix typos and fire shortcuts by voice while you keep typing. No dictation, no cloud. Say the word, it patches the closest match in your text field. Built in Swift, on-device. MIT open source. macOS 12+.

products.name: Kineforge AI/ML model for robotics
products.tagline: Train robot brains without demos on one GPU
products.summaryZh: 在单GPU上无需演示即可训练机器人智能
products.descriptionZh: Kineforge无需人类遥操作演示即可训练具身控制策略。冻结语义先验+可微分物理引擎(MuJoCo MJX)+15.7万参数策略=单GPU数小时训练，CPU推理低于10毫秒。结构重于规模。
products.description: Kineforge trains embodied control policies without human teleoperation demos. Frozen semantic priors + differentiable physics (MuJoCo MJX) + a 157K-parameter policy = training in hours on a single GPU, and CPU inference under 10ms. Structure over scale.

products.name: REAPER Daemon
products.tagline: The daemon you let into REAPER
products.summaryZh: 你放进REAPER的守护进程
products.descriptionZh: Reaper Daemon 是你放进 REAPER 的守护进程，一个本地小型桥接工具，让 Claude Code、Codex 或任何 AI 代理操控你的 DAW。用日常英语提出需求，它会在你的真实项目中进行实际编辑。人性化的鼓点律动写入你的音色库。在真实插件上执行精准 EQ 调整，并告诉你原因。无需浏览器扩展、服务器或 MCP。完全本地运行，每次编辑都可一键撤销。
products.description: Reaper Daemon is the daemon you let into REAPER, a small local bridge that lets Claude Code, Codex, or any AI agent drive your DAW. Ask in plain English; it makes the real edit in your real project. Humanized drum grooves written into your kit. Surgical EQ on an actual plugin, and it tells you why. No browser extension, no server, no MCP. 100% local, and every edit is one undo away.

products.name: Our Family Habits App
products.tagline: Build strong family rhythms, one habit at a time.
products.summaryZh: 建立稳固的家庭节奏，一次养成一个习惯。
products.descriptionZh: 多数家庭应用只帮孩子完成家务。我们的家庭习惯则帮助家庭塑造品格。在共享家庭面板中追踪习惯、日常事务、家务、奖励和目标。旨在减轻父母的精神负担，建立明确期望，帮助孩子在责任感、一致性和自主性上成长。适合在家教育、重组家庭或传统家庭，帮助建立更稳固的家庭节奏，让家更安宁。培养习惯，增强责任感，建立节奏。
products.description: Most family apps help kids complete chores. Our Family Habits helps families build character. Track habits, routines, chores, rewards, and goals in one shared family dashboard. Designed to reduce the mental load on parents, create clear expectations, and help children grow in responsibility, consistency, and ownership. Perfect for homeschool, blended, or traditional families seeking stronger family rhythms and more peace at home. Cultivate habits, grow responsibility, establish rhythms.

products.name: Botacts
products.tagline: The phonebook of AIs
products.summaryZh: AI通讯录
products.descriptionZh: 找到今天就能对话的AI机器人和智能体。电话、短信、邮件、WhatsApp、Telegram。只要能添加到通讯录，就能在botacts上找到。
products.description: Find AI bots and agents you can talk to today. Phone, text, email, WhatsApp, Telegram. If you can add it to contacts, you can find it on botacts.
